questions.ai_explanation: For a geometric progression, the middle term squared equals the product of outer terms: n² = (n-2)(n+3), solving gives n = 6, so the terms are 4, 6, 9 with common ratio r = 6/4 = 3/2.

questions.question: Find the value of p, if the line of which passes through (-1, -p) and (-2, 2) is parallel to the line 2y + 8x – 17 = 0.
questions.ai_explanation: The line 2y + 8x - 17 = 0 has slope -4; the parallel line through (-1, -p) and (-2, 2) has slope (2-(-p))/(-2-(-1)) = (2+p)/(-1) = -4, giving p = -6/7.

questions.question: Find the equation of the locus of a point P(x, y) which is equidistant form Q(0,0) and R(2, 1).
questions.ai_explanation: For equidistant points from Q(0,0) and R(2,1): √(x² + y²) = √((x-2)² + (y-1)²), expanding and simplifying yields 4x + 2y = 5.

questions.question: An arc of a circle subtends an angle of 300 on the circumference of a circle of a radius 21cm. Find the length of the arc
questions.ai_explanation: An arc subtending 30° at the center (not circumference) of a circle with radius 21 cm has length = (30/360) × 2π × 21 = (1/12) × 42π = 22 cm.

questions.question: Three teachers shared a packet of chalk. The first teacher got 2/5 of the chalk and the second teacher received 2/15 of the remainder. What fraction did the third teacher receive?
questions.ai_explanation: First teacher gets 2/5, leaving 3/5; second teacher gets (2/15) × (3/5) = 2/25; third teacher receives 1 - 2/5 - 2/25 = 25/25 - 10/25 - 2/25 = 13/25.

questions.question: Factorize completely ac – 2bc – a2 + 4b2
questions.ai_explanation: Regrouping: ac - 2bc - a² + 4b² = c(a - 2b) - (a² - 4b²) = c(a - 2b) - (a - 2b)(a + 2b) = (a - 2b)(c - a + 2b).

questions.question: The length L of a simple pendulum varies directly as the square of its period T. if a pendulum with period 4 secs is 64cm long, find the length of a pendulum whose period is 9 sec.
questions.ai_explanation: Since L ∝ T², we have L = kT²; with L = 64 when T = 4, k = 4, so L = 4(9²) = 324cm.

questions.question: What is the rate of change of the volume v of hemisphere with respect to its radius r when r = 2?
